nasb.text: Then the sons of Israel cried out to the Lord, saying, “We have sinned against You, for indeed, we have forsaken our God and served the Baals.”

esv.text: And the people of Israel cried out to the Lord, saying, “We have sinned against you, because we have forsaken our God and have served the Baals.”

cnv.text: 以色列人向耶和華哀求，說：“我們得罪了你，因為我們離棄了我們的　神，服事眾巴力。”

ccb.text: 于是，他们呼求耶和华说：“我们背弃我们的上帝去祭拜巴力，我们得罪了你。”
